name: CRUD/all-resource-types-r5-only
description: Creates and reads every concrete FHIR resource type introduced in R5, gated on the target declaring fhirVersion 5.0.x.

variable.name: actorDefinitionId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created ActorDefinition

variable.name: artifactAssessmentId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created ArtifactAssessment

variable.name: biologicallyDerivedProductDispenseId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense

variable.name: conditionDefinitionId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created ConditionDefinition

variable.name: deviceAssociationId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created DeviceAssociation

variable.name: deviceDispenseId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created DeviceDispense

variable.name: deviceUsageId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created DeviceUsage

variable.name: encounterHistoryId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created EncounterHistory

variable.name: formularyItemId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created FormularyItem

variable.name: genomicStudyId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created GenomicStudy

variable.name: imagingSelectionId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created ImagingSelection

variable.name: inventoryItemId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created InventoryItem

variable.name: inventoryReportId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created InventoryReport

variable.name: nutritionIntakeId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created NutritionIntake

variable.name: permissionId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created Permission

variable.name: requestOrchestrationId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created RequestOrchestration

variable.name: requirementsId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created Requirements

variable.name: testPlanId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created TestPlan

variable.name: transportId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created Transport

test.name: Can create and read ActorDefinition
test.description: When the target server declares ActorDefinition create and read interactions, POST /ActorDefinition must create a synthetic ActorDefinition and GET /ActorDefinition/{id} must read it back.

operation.description: POST a synthetic ActorDefinition

assert.description: ActorDefinition create must return HTTP 201 Created
Create response body must be a ActorDefinition
Server must assign an id

operation.description: GET the created ActorDefinition by server-assigned id

assert.description: ActorDefinition read must return HTTP 200 OK
Read response body must be a ActorDefinition
Read id must match the created id
